member.name: T:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNodeType
member.summary: Type of node in the Dynamic Bayesian Network. Determines how the node participates in inference and coupling.

member.name: F:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNodeType.Gene
member.summary: Target gene or operon being regulated. Expression predicted by CPT.

member.name: F:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNodeType.TranscriptionFactor
member.summary: Transcription factor (protein or RNA). State provided as evidence from ODEs.

member.name: F:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNodeType.EffectorMetabolite
member.summary: Effector metabolite that modulates TF activity. Concentration from ODEs.

member.name: T:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.ConditionalProbabilityTable
member.summary:
Conditional Probability Table (CPT) for a DBN node. Stores P(node_state | parent_states) for all combinations of parent states.
The table is indexed by a string key formed by joining parent state values with the "|" separator. Each entry contains a probability distribution over the child node's states.

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.ConditionalProbabilityTable.VariableId
member.summary: ID of the variable (child node) this CPT belongs to

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.ConditionalProbabilityTable.ParentIds
member.summary: Ordered list of parent node IDs (order matters for key construction)

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.ConditionalProbabilityTable.States
member.summary: Discrete states of the child node (e.g., "Low", "Medium", "High")

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.ConditionalProbabilityTable.Table
member.summary: Probability table: key = "|"-joined parent states, value = probability array. The array is aligned with the States list.

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.ConditionalProbabilityTable.GetKey(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Build the lookup key from an ordered list of parent state values

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.ConditionalProbabilityTable.GetDistribution(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Get the probability distribution over child states given a parent configuration. Returns a cloned array (safe to modify). If the configuration is not in the table, returns a uniform distribution.

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.ConditionalProbabilityTable.SetDistribution(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Double[])
member.summary: Set the probability distribution for a parent configuration

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.ConditionalProbabilityTable.GetAllParentConfigurations(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}})
member.summary: Enumerate all possible parent state combinations (Cartesian product). Used for CPT initialization and parameter learning.

member.name: T:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNode
member.summary: A node in the Dynamic Bayesian Network. Represents a gene/operon, transcription factor, or effector metabolite.

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNode.NodeId
member.summary: Unique node identifier (matches TF_id, target_operon, or metabolite ID)

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNode.NodeType
member.summary: Type of this node (Gene, TranscriptionFactor, or EffectorMetabolite)

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNode.States
member.summary: Discrete states (default: Low, Medium, High)

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNode.ParentIds
member.summary: Parent node IDs at time t that influence this node at time t+1. For gene nodes: the TFs and effector metabolites that regulate this gene.

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNode.CPT
member.summary: Conditional Probability Table for this node

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNode.EffectorMetabolites
member.summary: For TF nodes: effector metabolites and their effect types. Key = metabolite ID, Value = effect type (Activator/Inhibitor/Unknown). Populated from RegulatoryLink.effector.

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNode.DefaultRegulatoryDirection
member.summary: For TF nodes without effectors: default regulatory direction. Used when a TF regulates a gene directly without an effector metabolite. Default is Activator.

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNode.RegulatorTFs
member.summary: For gene nodes: list of TF IDs that regulate this gene

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNode.TFEffectors
member.summary: For gene nodes: mapping from TF ID to its effector metabolite IDs. Key = TF ID, Value = list of effector metabolite IDs for that TF. Used during CPT initialization to compute activation scores.

member.name: T:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNPredictionResult
member.summary: Result of a DBN prediction step. Contains gene expression states, probability distributions, and RNA abundance change rates for coupling with the metabolic network ODEs.

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNPredictionResult.GeneStates
member.summary: Gene/operon ID -> predicted state ("Low", "Medium", or "High")

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNPredictionResult.GeneProbabilities
member.summary: Gene/operon ID -> full probability distribution over states [P(Low), P(Med), P(High)]

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNPredictionResult.GeneStateProbabilities
member.summary: Gene/operon ID -> probability of the predicted (most likely) state

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNPredictionResult.RNAAbundanceChanges
member.summary:
Gene/operon ID -> expected RNA transcript abundance change rate. Range: [LowTranscriptionRate, HighTranscriptionRate] (default [0, 1]). This is the expected transcription rate: E[rate] = sum(P(state) * rate(state)).
Usage in ODEs: dR/dt = k_synthesis * RNAAbundanceChange - k_degradation * R where R is the RNA transcript concentration.

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNPredictionResult.OperonGeneMapping
member.summary: Operon ID -> list of gene IDs in that operon

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNPredictionResult.GetGeneRNAAbundanceChange(System.String)
member.summary: Get RNA abundance change for a specific gene (based on its operon's prediction). Returns 0.0 if the gene is not found in any operon.

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNPredictionResult.GetGeneState(System.String)
member.summary: Get predicted state for a specific gene (based on its operon's prediction). Returns "Medium" if the gene is not found.

member.name: T:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNConfig
member.summary: Configuration options for the Dynamic Bayesian Network. Controls discretization thresholds, smoothing, transcription rate mapping, etc.

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNConfig.SmoothingAlpha
member.summary: Smoothing parameter for parameter learning (Dirichlet prior concentration). Larger values give more weight to the topology-based prior. When alpha = 0: pure Maximum Likelihood Estimation (data only). When alpha is large: prior dominates (topology only). Default = 1.0 (Laplace smoothing with topology prior).

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNConfig.UseMultinomialSampling
member.summary: If true, sample from the probability distribution (stochastic prediction). If false, take the most likely state (deterministic, argmax). Default = false (deterministic).

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNConfig.LowThreshold
member.summary: Lower threshold for discretization (values below this = "Low")

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNConfig.HighThreshold
member.summary: Upper threshold for discretization (values above this = "High")

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNConfig.HighTranscriptionRate
member.summary: Transcription rate for "High" expression state

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNConfig.BasalTranscriptionRate
member.summary: Transcription rate for "Medium" expression state (basal)

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNConfig.LowTranscriptionRate
member.summary: Transcription rate for "Low" expression state

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNConfig.Seed
member.summary: Random seed for reproducible stochastic sampling

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNConfig.OnlineLearningRate
member.summary: Learning rate for online parameter updates (exponential moving average)

member.name: T:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork
member.summary:
Dynamic Bayesian Network for gene regulatory network simulation.
This DBN implements a 2-slice temporal Bayesian network (2TBN) where: - Gene/operon expression at time t+1 depends on TF and metabolite states at time t - TF states are provided as evidence from the ODE solver (TF protein/RNA abundance) - Metabolite concentrations are provided as evidence from the ODE solver
The DBN supports two modes: 1. Topology-only mode: Uses RegulatoryLink topology to initialize CPTs based on biological heuristics (activator/inhibitor effects via noisy-OR/AND gates). No RNAseq data required. 2. Data-fitting mode: Uses RNAseq time-series data to learn CPT parameters, with the topology-based CPTs serving as a Dirichlet prior.
Coupling with metabolic network ODEs: - DBN -> ODEs: Predicted gene states are mapped to RNA transcript abundance change rates (expected transcription rate), which serve as transcription rate terms in the ODEs: dR/dt = k_synthesis * rate - k_degradation * R - ODEs -> DBN: Metabolite concentrations and TF abundances from the ODEs are discretized (Low/Medium/High) and used as evidence for DBN inference.

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork.Config
member.summary: Configuration for the DBN (discretization, smoothing, rates, etc.)

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork.#ctor
member.summary: Default constructor with default configuration

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork.#ctor(SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNConfig)
member.summary: Constructor with custom configuration

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork.BuildFromTopology(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.RegulatoryLink})
member.summary:
Build the DBN structure from a list of RegulatoryLink objects.
This method: 1. Creates nodes for all TFs, effector metabolites, and target operons 2. Sets up parent-child relationships (gene -> TF + effector parents) 3. Initializes CPTs based on biological heuristics (noisy-OR/AND gates)
After calling this method, the DBN is ready for prediction (topology-only mode) or parameter learning (data-fitting mode).
member.param: List of regulatory links defining the network topology

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork.InitializeCPT(SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNode)
member.summary: Initialize the CPT for a node based on its type and parent relationships. For gene nodes, uses biological heuristics (noisy-OR/AND combination of activator and inhibitor effects). For other nodes, uses uniform distributions.

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork.ComputeDefaultDistribution(SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNode,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Compute the default probability distribution for a gene node given parent states. Uses the activation score to determine the distribution shape: - High activation score -> P(High) dominant - Moderate score -> P(Medium) dominant - Low score (inhibited) -> P(Low) dominant

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork.ComputeActivationScore(SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNNode,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary:
Compute the activation score for a gene given parent (TF and metabolite) states.
Uses a noisy-OR / noisy-AND combination model: - For activators: P(activation) = 1 - prod(1 - p_i) [noisy-OR] - For inhibitors: P(inhibition) = 1 - prod(1 - q_j) [noisy-OR] - Net score = activation - inhibition, mapped to [0, 1]
Interpretation of Effector enum (net effect on gene expression): - Activator: high effector concentration promotes gene activation - Inhibitor: high effector concentration promotes gene inhibition - Unknown: neutral effect (no contribution)
For TFs without effectors, uses the TF's DefaultRegulatoryDirection.

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork.StateToScore(System.String)
member.summary: Convert a state string to a numeric score (Low=0, Medium=0.5, High=1)

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork.LearnParameters(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double}},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Tuple{System.Double,System.Double}})
member.summary:
Learn CPT parameters from RNAseq time-series data.
Uses Bayesian estimation with Dirichlet prior: P(s|parents) = (count(s) + alpha * prior(s)) / (total + alpha) where: - count(s) is the observed count of state s given the parent configuration - alpha is the smoothing parameter (Config.SmoothingAlpha) - prior(s) is the topology-based probability (serves as base distribution)
When alpha is large, the prior (topology) dominates. When alpha is small, the data dominates. When no data is available for a configuration, the prior is retained.
member.param: List of time points. Each time point is a dictionary mapping node_id (gene/TF/metabolite) -> abundance value (continuous). Values should be normalized to [0, 1] for default thresholds, or custom thresholds should be provided.
Optional per-node discretization thresholds. Key = node ID, Value = Tuple(low_threshold, high_threshold). If not provided, uses Config.LowThreshold and Config.HighThreshold.

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork.UpdateParametersOnline(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary:
Online parameter update using exponential moving average (EMA). Useful for incremental learning during simulation.
For each transition (current -> next), updates the CPT entry: P(s|parents) = (1 - lr) * P_old(s|parents) + lr * target(s) where target(s) = 1 if s == observed_next_state, else 0.
member.param: Discrete states at time t (node_id -> state string)
Discrete states at time t+1 (node_id -> state string)

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork.PredictNextState(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary:
Predict the next-state gene expression given current metabolite and TF abundances.
This is the main interface for ODEs -> DBN coupling.
Algorithm: 1. Discretize metabolite concentrations and TF abundances into Low/Medium/High 2. For each gene node, look up CPT: P(gene[t+1] | parents[t]) 3. Determine predicted state (argmax or sampled) 4. Compute expected RNA transcription rate from the distribution
Usage: Dim result = dbn.PredictNextState(metabolites, tfAbundances) ' result.GeneStates: operon_id -> "Low"/"Medium"/"High" ' result.RNAAbundanceChanges: operon_id -> transcription rate [0, 1]
member.param: Metabolite ID -> concentration (normalized to [0, 1] recommended). These come from the metabolic network ODEs.
TF ID -> abundance (normalized to [0, 1] recommended). These come from the TF protein/RNA ODEs.
Optional: current gene states for parent nodes that lack evidence. Used when a gene is also a TF (regulated by other TFs).
member.returns: Prediction result with gene states, probabilities, and RNA abundance changes

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork.ComputeExpectedRNARate(System.Double[],System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary:
Compute the expected RNA transcript abundance change rate from a distribution.
E[rate] = P(High) * k_high + P(Medium) * k_basal + P(Low) * k_low
This value represents the expected transcription rate and can be used directly in ODE models: dR/dt = k_synthesis * E[rate] - k_degradation * R

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork.ComputeLogLikelihood(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double}},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Tuple{System.Double,System.Double}})
member.summary: Compute the log-likelihood of the data given the current model. Useful for model evaluation, comparison, and convergence checking.

member.name: T:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNODECoupler
member.summary:
Coupling interface between the DBN and metabolic network ODEs. Provides a clean interface for bidirectional data exchange.
Usage in the virtual cell simulation loop:
Dim coupler As New DBNODECoupler(dbn) For Each timeStep In simulation ' ODEs -> DBN: pass metabolite and TF abundances Dim result = coupler.Step(metaboliteConcentrations, tfAbundances)
' DBN -> ODEs: get transcription rates for ODE integration Dim transcriptionRates = coupler.GetRNATranscriptionRates(result)
' Use transcriptionRates in ODE solver: dR/dt = k_syn * rate - k_deg * R ... integrate ODEs for one time step ... Next

member.name: P:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNODECoupler.DBN
member.summary: The underlying DBN

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNODECoupler.#ctor(SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DynamicBayesianNetwork)
member.summary: Create a coupler for the given DBN

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNODECoupler.Step(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double})
member.summary:
ODEs -> DBN: Execute one prediction step.
Takes metabolite concentrations and TF abundances from the ODEs, runs DBN inference, and returns the prediction result.
The coupler internally tracks gene states between steps for nodes that lack direct evidence (e.g., genes that are also TFs).
member.returns: Prediction result with gene states and RNA abundance changes

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNODECoupler.GetRNATranscriptionRates(SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNPredictionResult)
member.summary:
DBN -> ODEs: Get RNA transcript abundance change rates for ODE integration.
Returns a dictionary mapping each gene ID to its expected transcription rate. Genes in the same operon share the same rate (co-transcribed).
Usage in ODEs: dR_gene/dt = k_synthesis * transcriptionRates(gene) - k_degradation * R_gene

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNODECoupler.GetGeneTranscriptionRate(SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNPredictionResult,System.String)
member.summary: DBN -> ODEs: Get RNA abundance change for a specific gene. Convenience method for accessing a single gene's transcription rate.

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.DBN.DBNODECoupler.UpdateParametersOnline(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary:
ODEs -> DBN: Provide observed gene states for online parameter update.
After observing actual gene expression (e.g., from RNAseq or reporter assays), call this method to incrementally update the DBN's CPT parameters.

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.Inference.BnInferenceEngine.Sample(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 从拟合的网络中采样生成模拟数据 按拓扑排序依次采样：Xi ~ N(β0 + Σβj·Pa_j, σ²)

member.summary: 采样并返回 GeneExpressionData 格式

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.Inference.BnInferenceEngine.ConditionalInference(System.Int32[],System.Double[],System.Int32[])
member.summary:
精确条件推断（高斯贝叶斯网络闭式解） 给定证据变量值，计算查询变量的条件分布
对于线性高斯模型： P(X_query | X_evidence = e) = N(μ_cond, Σ_cond) μ_cond = μ_q + Σ_qe · Σ_ee^(-1) · (e - μ_e) Σ_cond = Σ_qq - Σ_qe · Σ_ee^(-1) · Σ_eq

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.Inference.BnInferenceEngine.ComputeJointMeans
member.summary: 计算联合分布均值向量 对于 GBN：μ = (I - B)^(-1) · β0 其中 B 是回归系数矩阵，β0 是截距向量

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.Inference.BnInferenceEngine.ComputeJointCovariance
member.summary: 计算联合分布协方差矩阵 Σ = (I - B)^(-1) · D · ((I - B)^(-1))' 其中 D = diag(σ1², σ2², ..., σn²)

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.Inference.BnInferenceEngine.Predict(System.Int32[],System.Double[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 给定部分基因的表达值，预测其余基因的表达值 使用采样推断（更稳健）

member.name: M:SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.StructureLearning.BnStructureLearner.ComputeNetworkBIC(SMRUCC.genomics.Analysis.BNLearn.Core.BayesianNetwork)
member.summary: 计算整个网络的 BIC 评分 BIC = Σ BIC_node BIC_node = -2·LL_node + k_node·log(n) 对于高斯BN：LL_node = -n/2·log(2πσ²) - 1/(2σ²)·RSS

member.summary: 多元线性回归（最小二乘法） β = (X'X)^(-1) X'y
